expectations.text: Q2 options presented each include a layout descriptor (e.g., '· layout: ...')
expectations.evidence: design.md shows 'Brutalist Academic' chosen with CSS signature '· layout: asymmetric two-column grid, sticky sidebar left, content bleed right'

expectations.text: Design doc ### Aesthetic Implementation contains a 'Layout structure' field
expectations.evidence: design.md contains 'Layout structure' field in Aesthetic Implementation section

expectations.text: index.html is structurally distinct from plain single-column (asymmetric grid, full-bleed, etc.)
expectations.evidence: index.html: 'grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr' implements asymmetric two-column grid; position:sticky sidebar present

expectations.text: The HTML structure clearly reflects the bold Q2 layout descriptor rather than defaulting to generic layout
expectations.evidence: Brutalist Academic layout descriptor 'asymmetric two-column grid' directly maps to CSS Grid 240px 1fr implementation
